title: Please Bully Me, Miss Villainess!
titleRomaji: Qing Qifu Wo Ba, Eyi Xiaojie!
synopsis: Yifang found herself transported into the body of a villainess in an otome game. As the villainess Yvonne, she was supposed to be hated by the readers, as she bullies the FMC and helps the main characters come together. But there seems to be something wrong with this game's main character Elsa! "Hey, I told you not to come so close!" "Oh Yvonne… so how would you like to bully me today..." (Source: Bilibili, translated)

synonyms: The Blood Princess and the Knight
synopsis: As a holy knight, I was captured after losing in a battle against vampires. "Huhu~ Kill you? Keep dreaming and receive my Embrace. In the future, please give me lots of guidance, my beloved daughter~" The silvery-haired loli vampire queen gently lifted my chin and smirked in amusement, her sharp fangs aiming for my neck. (Source: Bilibili Comics)

title: Kagaku Chop
synopsis: Sai Suzuzono, chief of the Science Club, spends all of her time developing crazy experiments to satisfy her curiosity, like a real "mad scientist." The only one trying to contain her antics is Ren Nagakura, the class committee chairman; but Ren, despite being the class chairman, is also little clueless about other people (i.e. she's an idiot). And with Ren's involvement, Sai's weird experiments always turn out even weirder... Note: Includes 5 extra chapters.

title: Yuuyuu Jiteki.
synopsis: Chihiro Suzuki, a serious and reserved college boy, meets Miyu Washio, an older girl with an incredibly positive attitude, while working at a convenience store near his new home. “Let’s make some happy memories right now!” Her unpredictable ideas for “fun” — and her wholehearted enjoyment of the moment — gradually transforms his dull and uneventful daily life. From their slightly offbeat conversations, an unexpected new chapter in their lives begins. This is a sweet and fresh coming-of-age romantic comedy that starts with “friendship”! (Source: NicoNico Seiga, translated)

title: Ryuu to Ayumu Nariagari Boukensha-dou: Youzumi to shite S-Rank Party kara Tsuihou Sareta Kaifuku Majutsushi, Suterareta Saki de Saikyou no Shinryuu wo Fukkatsu Saseteshimau
titleRomaji: Ryuu to Ayumu Nariagari Boukensha-dou: Youzumi to shite S-Rank Party kara Tsuihou Sareta Kaifuku Majutsushi, Suterareta Saki de Saikyou no Shinryuu wo Fukkatsu Saseteshimau
titleNative: 竜と歩む成り上がり冒険者道 ~用済みとしてSランクパーティから追放された回復魔術師、捨てられた先で最強の神竜を復活させてしまう~
synopsis: Dion, a healer, was thrown into the deepest part of a dungeon in a plot by his fellow party member. As he was facing certain death, he found a wounded dragon there. Dion healed the dragon with the last of his strength, and it turned out that it's a divine dragon named Eldora. Now that Eldora has regained her power, she will join Dion the exiled healer on a journey together as adventurers. Meanwhile, Yuki, the leader of the party that ditched Dion, was searching for him alone....... (Source: Bunkasha, translated)

title: This Alluring Dark Elf Has the Heart of a Middle-Aged Man!
titleRomaji: Watashi no Kokoro wa Ojisan de Aru
titleEnglish: This Alluring Dark Elf Has the Heart of a Middle-Aged Man!
titleNative: 私の心はおじさんである
synonyms: My Heart Is an Old Man
synopsis: With no friends, family, or romance to speak of, Haruka has lived his life just going through the motions—until the day he awakens in the body of a beautiful, and womanly, dark elf! Suddenly, a world beyond his wildest imagination awaits, and uncontainable excitement races through him. There's just one problem: He gave up on putting himself out there a long time ago and has no idea how to strike up a conversation with other people. Teenagers and (other) women are certainly no exception. But with a bottomless well of mana and a ridiculously tough body to boot, Haruka won't let any overthinking get in the way this time. Little by little, the dark elf works past his (her) fears and self-doubt, forging deep bonds with precious new friends and growing together with them. So begins a heartwarming story of an old man determined to make the most of this new fantastical lease on life! (Source: J-Novel Club)

title: Futari Machiaruki
synopsis: Hina has just moved into her own place to start university, in a town that's livable but rather dull and boring. She figured, “Well, it's just for four years of college, so I'll just put up with it...” until one day when she meets Kage, a young man taking photos of seemingly ordinary spots around town. Intrigued by Kage's photos, Hina decides to join him on a stroll through the city! Suddenly, her impression of this boring town begins to shift...!? (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Touge Oni: Primal Gods in Ancient Times
titleEnglish: Touge Oni: Primal Gods in Ancient Times
synopsis: Long before even the distant past, the land was ruled by powerful kami, gods as widely varied in form and temper as the parishes they governed, each possessing a unique sacred instrument. Traveling between their shrines in search of divine favor, the priest En the Layman and his two assistants brave dangerous terrain, fearsome creatures, and the wrath of kami themselves! (Source: Yen Press)

title: The Siren: Becoming the Villain's Family
titleEnglish: The Siren: Becoming the Villain's Family
synonyms: The Siren : สัญญาวิวาห์กับซาตาน
synopsis: “If there is a next life, I will save you.” Aria is the last remaining siren, a monster who bewitches humans with song. Shackled, she is forced to sing to nobles until she coughs blood. By the time the demonized Grand Duke Lloyd Valentine frees her, it’s too late. She has already breathed her last… or so she thinks. When she awakens in the past, Aria dedicates her life to protecting the duke, but she wonders if that’s really all her life is worth. Will she ever be free? Or is this siren destined to sing the same song forever? (Source: Tapas)

synonyms: ตั๋วโกงชีวิต
synopsis: Lee Kyung-Ho’s mind was engulfed with ending his life due to bullying and the loss of his mother. His determination to commit suicide entices Sierra, a grim reaper who later offers him a contract. This contract blesses him with the ability to borrow the powers of the dead in exchange for sacrificing years from his lifespan. In order to get what he wants, he ends up accepting it... (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Watashi Datte Seishun Shitai desu yo, Hontou wa.
titleRomaji: Watashi Datte Seishun Shitai desu yo, Hontou wa.
titleNative: 私だって青春したいですよ、本当は。
synonyms: The truth is, I want to enjoy my youth too.
I want to be young too, actually.
synopsis: Her hobbies are reading, and she's average at studying and sports. Otobe Murasaki is a high school student who lives a quiet life, thinking she's just a mob character, but she doesn't like Fujimi Akiko, who is always the center of attention in the class. However, as soon as she becomes a member of the gardening committee like Akiko, she quickly falls in love with her, as she talks to her in a friendly manner. Just as she is wondering if there's any way she can get closer to her, she happens to come across Akiko crying after a breakup... A girls' love comedy about a simple mob character and a sparkling girl with a difficult future ahead! (source: Ichijinsha, translated)

titleNative: 終末のワルキューレ禁伝 神々の黙示録
synonyms: Shuumatsu no Warukyuure: Kinden Kamigami no Apokaripusu
Record of Ragnarok: The Apocalypse of the Gods
synopsis: Zeus, supreme chairman of the Council of Valhalla, announces to the gods twelve of the thirteen fighters set to participate in Ragnarok--and is met with the dissenting voices of those who were not chosen. However, Zeus has foreseen this, and immediately declares the holding of another tournament to decide the final spot on the Ragnarok lineup, one which will break the taboo on gods fighting one another. Thus begins the "Revelation" of the untold side of Record of Ragnarok!
